## v1.0.15 — Setup Hub CMD progress window

### Setup Hub install visibility
- **Popup CMD window** on Windows during install/update — live tail of `setup-hub-install.log`
- Per-addon progress streamed to CMD and the Setup Hub UI

### E2E stability
- Splash dismiss pre-sets `sessionStorage` before navigation and uses force-click fallback

Existing installs should pick this up via GitHub auto-update, or download the new installer below.
